includeFree.title: Include Free Communities
includeFree.description: When enabled, free ($0/month) communities are scraped alongside paid ones.

paidOnly.title: Paid Communities Only
paidOnly.description: When enabled, free communities are always skipped even if Include Free is on.

minMRR.title: Minimum Estimated MRR ($)
minMRR.description: Skip paid communities whose estimated MRR (members × price) is below this value. Ignored for free communities.

minMembers.title: Minimum Members
minMembers.description: Skip communities with fewer members than this. Set to 0 to disable.

maxMembers.title: Maximum Members
maxMembers.description: Skip communities with more members than this. Leave empty for no limit.

maxItems.title: Max Communities to Save
maxItems.description: Stop after saving this many communities.

maxScrolls.title: Max Scrolls per Page
maxScrolls.description: How many times to scroll down each discovery page to load more results.

existingUrls.title: Existing Community URLs
existingUrls.description: List of already-scraped Skool URLs to skip (deduplication against your Google Sheet).
